title: GraveLootZ
description: A minecraft grave plugin which adds your loot to a chest
body:
![GraveLootZ Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f1e128bf5e826e842e9ee86b5a4f13bce2d8086_0.webp)
Advertisement:

Text Version # GraveLootZ: Secure Death Storage for Minecraft Servers ## Overview GraveLootZ transforms the frustrating experience of losing items upon death into a manageable recovery mission. When players die, their inventory items are securely stored in a chest grave at or near their death location, giving them time to return and reclaim their precious loot. ## Core Features ### 🪦 Automatic Grave Creation - Items automatically stored in a chest upon death - Intelligent placement algorithm finds suitable locations nearby if death spot is obstructed - Custom grave messages showing ownership ### ⏱️ Expiration System - Configurable expiration timer for graves - Option to drop items or remove them when graves expire - Visual countdown indicators ### 🧭 Navigation Aids - Optional compass given upon death that points to most recent grave - Coordinates displayed in chat messages - Commands to list all active graves ### 🛡️ Protection Options - Graves can be protected from other players - Permission-based access control - Admin override capabilities ### 📋 Comprehensive Commands - `/graves` - List all your active graves - `/graves tp ` - Teleport to a specific grave - `/graves help` - Display command help ### 🌐 World Management - Disable grave creation in specific worlds - Configure different behaviors per world - Perfect for minigames or challenge arenas ## Advanced Configuration The plugin comes with an extensive configuration system allowing server owners to fine-tune every aspect: - Customize grave protection mechanics - Adjust expiration timers - Configure visual elements and messages - Set permission requirements - Enable/disable features as needed ## Why Choose GraveLootZ? Unlike simpler death chest plugins, GraveLootZ provides a complete grave management ecosystem with smart placement logic, time limitations, and navigation tools. It strikes the perfect balance between eliminating the frustration of permanent item loss and maintaining the challenge of item recovery after death. Server owners love how it reduces player complaints about lost items while still preserving gameplay tension. Players appreciate the second chance to recover valuable gear without completely removing death consequences. Perfect for survival servers, faction gameplay, or any environment where you want to maintain challenge without excessive punishment. GraveLootZ transforms death from a rage-quit moment into an exciting recovery mission!
